name: Full Consensus (Contra Ask Concentration) Tighter
hypothesis: Tightening the threshold on the successful multi-primitive consensus model `(obi_1 + obi_ex_bbo) - 2 * ask_depth_concentration` will isolate higher-conviction signals, potentially increasing the win rate and expectancy beyond the current +6.72 bps plateau.
mutation_note: Implemented signal-improver proposal: tightened threshold from 1.2 to 1.5 to test high-conviction subset.
